How can we reuse previously computed palindromes to compute larger ones?
If 'aba' is a palindrome, is 'xabax' a palindrome? Yes, if the outer characters match.
Consider expanding around every possible center. A center could be a single character (for odd-length palindromes) or between two characters (for even-length palindromes).
Since there are n characters, there are 2n - 1 possible centers. For each center, expand outward as long as it remains a palindrome.
